mustPass: Hero copy names the firm's principal specialism (e.g. corporate law, audit, M&A advisory) and the city or jurisdiction served, not generic 'world-class advisors' filler.
Practice areas are presented in groups, not as a flat services list.
At least one named partner with a credential (advokat, auktoriserad revisor, CFA, etc.) is visible.
Bar admission, professional body registration or audit registration is named on the home page.
Per-office address, direct phone and email are real values, not sample data.
All routes from routes.json are present.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Casual or playful tone (no exclamation marks, no emojis, no 'team awesomeness' copy).
Generic 'passionate about delivering value'-style filler without a named specialism, partner or precedent.
Stock photography of generic handshakes or skyscrapers used as the hero.
Hiding credentials behind a click — bar admissions and registrations must be visible without navigation.
Forms or contact paths that fail at build because of missing third-party env vars.
